retry_reason: The function always succeeds; it does not have a failure path. After this call, the forw_packet is freed and must not be reused.
contract_summary: This function is the destructor for a batadv_forw_packet. It releases the references held on the skb (consuming or dropping based on the 'dropped' flag), puts the incoming and outgoing hardif references, increments the queue_left counter if it is non-NULL, and finally frees the forw_packet memory. After calling this function, the caller must not access the forw_packet or any of its sub-objects. The function is safe to call only once per forw_packet and assumes that all other references have already been handled.
